calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Scott Hughes #12365 (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2005 Continued To Sep-13-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-09-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-09-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jul-19-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Vernon Bradley, Esq. for Plaintiff: Socrates Ordaniel Sals, also present.
David McKim, Esq. for Defendant: Annalee Salas Jimenez, also present in court.
Parties settled, terms read into the record by Mr. McKim as follows:
Settlement in the amount of $60,000.00 to be paid within 60 days. Mr. McKim will prepared the settlement document and forwarded to Mr. Bradley for approval.
Upon full payment, matter shall be dismissed with prejudice and mutually released each other from all claims, each to bear own costs anf fees.
Parties agreed to terms of the settlement, trial vacated and matter is placed on the CRC-225 calendar for Dismissal on July 19, 2005 in Dept. 212 at 10:00 A.M.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2005 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Vernon Lester Bradley, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered Vernon Lester Bradley, sanctioned $100.000, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225 (212)
